summary: Threaded comment system enhancement tests - All features VERIFIED. Backend API tests 5/5 PASSED. Frontend UI tests confirmed: reply buttons on ALL comments (including sub-comments), gold thread connecting lines (rgba(218,165,32,0.2)), 1-level nesting logic, replying to @username indicator with cancel button, auto-focus on reply input. Code review confirms smart notifications implemented for thread owner + direct parent.

test_create_reply_to_top_level.details: POST with parent_id creates reply with correct parent reference

test_get_comments_tree_structure.details: GET returns nested tree structure with 'replies' array

test_reply_has_correct_structure.details: Replies properly nested under parent comments

reply_button_all_comments.details: Found reply buttons on both top-level comments and sub-comments (data-testid='comment-reply-{id}')

thread_connecting_line.details: Gold thread line visible on replies (data-testid='thread-line-{id}', style: width 2px, rgba(218,165,32,0.2))

reply_indicator.details: 'replying to @username' indicator appears with cancel button when reply clicked

auto_focus_with_mention.details: Comment input auto-focused and pre-filled with @username

one_level_nesting.details: CommentItem.js line 53-55: _replyParentId uses topLevelId for sub-comment replies, ensuring flat 1-level nesting

view_more_replies_toggle.details: CommentThread shows first 2 replies when >3, with 'View X more replies' button (data-testid='view-replies-{id}')

smart_notifications.details: hive.py lines 1052-1065: Notifies both direct parent author AND thread owner (top-level comment author) when replying to a sub-comment, with de-duplication checks

seed_data_creation: Created test comments with TEST_251_ prefix for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Threaded comment system fully tested. Key components: CommentItem.js (SingleComment, CommentThread), HivePage.js (handleReply), hive.py (add_comment with smart notifications). Reply buttons use _replyParentId for 1-level flat nesting. Thread lines have gold styling rgba(218,165,32,0.2). View more toggle triggers at >3 replies showing first 2.
